name: Glazed Oranges
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup plain yogurt or shredded coconut (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove very thin strips of peel from 3 oranges.
2. Cut the strips into tiny slivers about 1-inch long and as thin as possible.
3. Remove all remaining white pith and peel from the oranges and discard.
4. Bring water, sugar, cream of tartar, and mace to a boil in a saucepan.
5. Add the slivers of orange rind and simmer until the syrup is reduced to 1 1/2 cups.
6. Place orange slices in a serving bowl.
7. Stir the liqueur into the syrup.
8. Pour over the oranges.
9. Cool in the refrigerator for 4 hours before serving.
10. Garnish with yogurt or coconut. Serves 6.
